description_long: This is a vintage Bell & Howell 8mm film camera, featuring a robust, metallic body with a textured, matte finish. The front of the camera is equipped with a rotating turret holding three distinct lenses, each with its own focusing ring and markings. The side panel displays a large, circular dial with the Bell & Howell branding and model information, as well as a winding lever and additional control dials. The rear side includes a film compartment door with a metallic latch and two red dials for film settings. The camera's overall form is compact and boxy, with rounded edges and a slightly arched top. Its design is utilitarian, with visible screws, mechanical switches, and a sturdy build typical of mid-20th-century film equipment.
description: A vintage Bell & Howell 8mm film camera with a textured metal body, rotating turret with three lenses, and prominent side dials and branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three-lens turret and focusing rings, with the main lens elements clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the Bell & Howell branding, large circular dial, and winding lever.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the plain, textured back panel with a few small buttons and the film compartment door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the metallic film compartment latch, two red dials, and the arched top of the camera.
